message.content:
{
  "lean_declaration": "lemma prop_fps_mulvar_comp_y_coeff {f g : ℕ → PowerSeries R} (h : embedUnivInBiv f = embedUnivInBiv g) : ∀ k, f k = g k := by\n  intro k\n  ext n\n  have hcoeff := congrArg (fun φ : BivFPS R => φ (Finsupp.single 0 n + Finsupp.single 1 k)) h\n  simpa [coeff_embedUnivInBiv] using hcoeff",
  "declaration_name": "prop_fps_mulvar_comp_y_coeff",
  "used_context": [
    "embedUnivInBiv",
    "coeff_embedUnivInBiv",
    "BivFPS",
    "Finsupp.single",
    "PowerSeries.ext"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Uses `coeff_embedUnivInBiv` from the surrounding file to translate bivariate coefficient equality into univariate coefficient equality.",
    "`PowerSeries.ext` is assumed available from Mathlib."
  ]
}
